completed_tasks.name: Backend fixes, pagination, risk level derivation, test scaffold
StudentFilters rewrite — debounce fix, course dropdown, 3-level risk select

remaining_tasks.name: Server component wiring + pagination UI + StudentTableBody + PaginationControls

blockers.description: STATE.md has an unresolved git merge conflict (<<<<<<< HEAD vs 40a24da). Must be resolved before gsd-tools can parse it reliably.
blockers.workaround: Resolve the conflict: keep the HEAD block (Phase 03, 10 completed plans). The other branch (40a24da) reflects stale state from March.

decisions.decision: Fixed counselor scoping bug by removing eq(students.counselorId, viewerId) for counselor role
decisions.rationale: Counselors should see all students, not just their own

decisions.decision: Risk level filter moved to SQL (not post-query) using onTrack boolean and isNull
decisions.rationale: Performance — avoids fetching all rows then filtering in JS

decisions.decision: Used useDebouncedCallback from use-debounce (already installed) instead of window timer hack
decisions.rationale: SSR-safe, idiomatic, avoids the D-17 bug

decisions.decision: GSD updated from v1.28.0 to v1.34.2 mid-session

next_action: Execute plan 03-03: update src/app/students/page.tsx (server component), create src/app/students/_components/student-table-body.tsx, create src/app/students/_components/pagination-controls.tsx. Resolve STATE.md merge conflict first.
context_notes: Wave 1 and Wave 2 of Phase 03 are complete with commits. Wave 3 (03-03) was interrupted by user mid-spawn when they asked to run codesight commands and then /gsd-update. The worktree agent for 03-02 may have left a branch (worktree-agent-ad2ec1e1) — check git branch -a.
